				} });","// Import required ServiceNow UI Framework modules
import { createCustomElement, actionTypes } from "@servicenow/ui-core";
import snabbdom from "@servicenow/ui-renderer-snabbdom";
import styles from "./styles.scss";

const { COMPONENT_PROPERTY_CHANGED } = actionTypes;
const OPERATION_CREATE = "create";
const MODE_STANDARD = "standard";
const MODE_COMBINE = "combine";

// --- Utility Helpers ---
const parseBoolean = (val) => {
	if (typeof val === "string") {
		const trimmed = val.trim().toLowerCase();
		return trimmed === "true" || trimmed === "1";
	}
	return Boolean(val);
};

const parseNumberSet = (input) => {
	const set = new Set();
	if (Array.isArray(input)) {
		input.forEach((n) => {
			const num = parseInt(n, 10);
			if (!isNaN(num)) set.add(num);
		});
	} else if (typeof input === "string" && input.trim()) {
		input.split(",").forEach((s) => {
			const num = parseInt(s.trim(), 10);
			if (!isNaN(num)) set.add(num);
		});
	}
	return set;
};

const computeWaferTotal = (wafer) => (Number(wafer) === 0 ? 25 : Number(wafer));

const getSelectedObj = (selected) =>
	typeof selected === "object" && selected !== null ? selected : {};

const isInValidRange = (num, min, max) =>
	!isNaN(num) && num >= min && num <= max;

const generateSelectedData = (mode, selected, editablevalues) => {
	if (mode === MODE_COMBINE) {
		return Object.entries(editablevalues || {})
			.map(([key, val]) => `${key}:${val}`)
			.join(",");
	}
	return Object.keys(selected || {})
		.filter((k) => selected[k])
		.join(",");
};

const view = (state, { updateProperties }) => {
	const {
		mode = MODE_STANDARD,
		wafer = 0,
		selected = {},
		editablevalues = {},
		editingIndex = null,
		editingValue = "",
		operation = OPERATION_CREATE,
	} = state;

	console.log("Current State:", state);

	const readonly = parseBoolean(state.readonly);
	const editableWafersSet = parseNumberSet(state.editablewafers);
	const total = computeWaferTotal(wafer);

	if (operation === OPERATION_CREATE && Number(wafer) === 0) {
		updateProperties({ wafer: 25, selected: {} });
	}

	const selectedObj = getSelectedObj(selected);
	const selectedKeys = Object.keys(selectedObj)
		.filter((key) => selectedObj[key])
		.map((k) => parseInt(k, 10));

	const allSelected = selectedKeys.length === total;
	const noneSelected = selectedKeys.length === 0;

	// When editablewafers is empty and readonly is true, the component is in
	// a "display-only" state — apply pink from the selected property so
	// previously selected wafers are visually highlighted as read-only pink.
	const isDisplayOnlyMode = readonly && editableWafersSet.size === 0;

	const buildWaferBoxClass = (index, isEdited, isSelected, isWaferReadonly) => {
		const isCombineMode = mode === MODE_COMBINE;
		let hasContent;
		if (isDisplayOnlyMode) {
			hasContent = isSelected;
		} else {
			hasContent = isCombineMode ? isEdited : isSelected;
		}
		const contentClass = hasContent ? " pink" : "";
		const readonlyClass = isWaferReadonly ? " readonly" : "";
		return `wafer-box${contentClass}${readonlyClass}`;
	};

	const isInvalidKeyPress = (key) => {
		return (
			key === "-" ||
			key === "e" ||
			key === "+" ||
			(key.length === 1 && !/[0-9]/.test(key))
		);
	};

	const handleWaferBoxClick = (index, isWaferReadonly) => {
		if (isWaferReadonly) return;
		if (mode === MODE_STANDARD) {
			toggleSelection(index);
		} else if (mode === MODE_COMBINE) {
			updateProperties({
				editingIndex: index,
				editingValue:
					editablevalues[index] !== undefined ? editablevalues[index] : index,
			});
		}
	};

	const filterDataByMaxValue = (selectedObj, editablevalues, maxVal) => {
		const filteredSelected = Object.fromEntries(
			Object.entries(selectedObj).filter(([key]) => {
				const numKey = parseInt(key, 10);
				return numKey >= 1 && numKey <= maxVal;
			}),
		);
		const filteredEditablevalues = Object.fromEntries(
			Object.entries(editablevalues).filter(([key]) => {
				const numKey = parseInt(key, 10);
				return numKey >= 1 && numKey <= maxVal;
			}),
		);
		return { filteredSelected, filteredEditablevalues };
	};

	const toggleSelection = (index) => {
		if (mode === MODE_COMBINE) return;
		const updated = { ...selectedObj };
		if (updated[index]) delete updated[index];
		else updated[index] = true;
		updateProperties({ selected: updated });
	};

	const isValidInput = (value) => /^\d{0,3}$/.test(value) || value === "";

	const handleEditChange = (index, value) => {
		if (isValidInput(value)) {
			updateProperties({ editingValue: value });
		}
	};

	const saveEdit = (index, value) => {
		const num = parseInt(value, 10);
		const isValidEdit =
			value !== "" &&
			value !== null &&
			value !== undefined &&
			isInValidRange(num, 1, 100);

		const updated = { ...editablevalues };
		if (isValidEdit) {
			updated[index] = num;
		} else {
			delete updated[index];
		}

		updateProperties({
			editablevalues: updated,
			editingIndex: null,
			editingValue: "",
		});
	};

	const cancelEdit = () => {
		updateProperties({ editingIndex: null, editingValue: "" });
	};

	const selectAll = () => {
		if (mode === MODE_COMBINE || allSelected) return;
		const newSelected = {};
		for (let i = 1; i <= total; i++) newSelected[i] = true;
		updateProperties({ selected: newSelected });
	};

	const unselectAll = () => {
		if (mode === MODE_COMBINE || noneSelected) return;
		updateProperties({ selected: {} });
	};

	return (
		<div>
			<div className="wafer-list-container" aria-label="Wafer(s) List">
				<div className="header">
					<div className="title">
						<strong>Wafer(s) List *</strong>
					</div>
					<div className="count" title="Total wafers">
						{operation === OPERATION_CREATE && mode !== MODE_COMBINE ? (
							<select
								id="mySelect"
								name="mySelect"
								value={`max_${wafer}`}
								disabled={readonly}
								on-change={(e) => {
									const val = parseInt(e.target.value.replace("max_", ""), 10);
									const { filteredSelected, filteredEditablevalues } =
										filterDataByMaxValue(selectedObj, editablevalues, val);
									updateProperties({
										wafer: val,
										selected: filteredSelected,
										editablevalues: filteredEditablevalues,
										editingIndex: null,
										editingValue: "",
									});
								}}
							>
								<option value="max_25">25</option>
								<option value="max_50">50</option>
								<option value="max_100">100</option>
							</select>
						) : (
							<span style={{ fontWeight: "bold" }}>Wafer count: {total}</span>
						)}
					</div>
				</div>

				<div className="wafer-grid" role="list">
					{Array.from({ length: total }, (_, i) => {
						const index = i + 1;
						const isSelected = !!selectedObj[index];
						const isEdited =
							mode === MODE_COMBINE && editablevalues[index] !== undefined;
						const isWaferReadonly = readonly && !editableWafersSet.has(index);
						const boxClass = buildWaferBoxClass(
							index,
							isEdited,
							isSelected,
							isWaferReadonly,
						);
						const currentValue =
							editablevalues[index] !== undefined
								? editablevalues[index]
								: index;
						const isEditing = editingIndex === index;

						return (
							<div
								className={boxClass}
								role="listitem"
								key={index}
								on-click={(e) => {
									e.stopPropagation();
									handleWaferBoxClick(index, isWaferReadonly);
								}}
							>
								{mode === MODE_COMBINE && isEditing ? (
									<div>
										<input
											type="number"
											min={1}
											max={100}
											className="wafer-input"
											value={state.editingValue}
											maxLength="3"
											autoFocus
											disabled={isWaferReadonly}
											on-click={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
											on-blur={(e) => saveEdit(index, e.target.value)}
											on-keydown={(e) => {
												if (
													isInvalidKeyPress(e.key) &&
													!e.ctrlKey &&
													!e.metaKey
												) {
													e.preventDefault();
												}
												if (e.key === "Enter") saveEdit(index, e.target.value);
												else if (e.key === "Escape") cancelEdit();
											}}
											on-input={(e) => handleEditChange(index, e.target.value)}
										/>
										<span className="static-number visible">{index}</span>
									</div>
								) : (
									<div>
										<input
											type="number"
											min={1}
											max={100}
											className="wafer-input"
											readOnly
											style={{
												border: "none",
												color: "none",
												background: "none",
											}}
											value={currentValue}
											maxLength="3"
											autoFocus
										/>
										{mode === MODE_COMBINE && isEdited ? (
											<span className="static-number visible">{index}</span>
										) : null}
									</div>
								)}
							</div>
						);
					})}
				</div>

				{mode !== MODE_COMBINE && !readonly && (
					<div className="select-toggle">
						<span
							className={`select-toggle-link${allSelected ? " disabled" : ""}`}
							role="button"
							tabIndex={allSelected ? "-1" : "0"}
							aria-disabled={String(allSelected)}
							on-click={allSelected ? undefined : selectAll}
						>
							Select all
						</span>
						<span className="select-toggle-divider"> | </span>
						<span
							className={`select-toggle-link${noneSelected ? " disabled" : ""}`}
							role="button"
							tabIndex={noneSelected ? "-1" : "0"}
							aria-disabled={String(noneSelected)}
							on-click={noneSelected ? undefined : unselectAll}
						>
							Unselect all
						</span>
					</div>
				)}
			</div>
		</div>
	);
};

createCustomElement("x-1851424-doli-comp", {
	transformState(state) {
		const { properties } = state;
		let { selected, readonly, editablewafers } = properties;

		// Parse selected property
		if (typeof selected === "string") {
			try {
				// Sentinel value from CS script — force a genuine reset to empty object.
				// The CS sets '__RESET__' first to guarantee a property-changed event fires,
				// then sets '' in a setTimeout to clear. Both cases resolve to {}.
				if (selected.trim() === "" || selected.trim() === "__RESET__") {
					properties.selected = {};
				} else {
					const clean = selected
						.split(",")
						.map((s) => s.trim())
						.filter(Boolean);
					const selectedObj = {};
					clean.forEach((num) => {
						const n = parseInt(num, 10);
						if (!isNaN(n)) selectedObj[n] = true;
					});
					properties.selected = selectedObj;
				}
			} catch (e) {
				console.warn("⚠️ Could not parse selected property:", selected);
				properties.selected = {};
			}
		}

		// Parse readonly property using utility
		properties.readonly = parseBoolean(readonly);

		// Parse editablewafers property using utility
		if (typeof editablewafers === "string" && editablewafers.trim() !== "") {
			const wafers = parseNumberSet(editablewafers);
			properties.editablewafers = Array.from(wafers);
		} else if (!Array.isArray(editablewafers)) {
			properties.editablewafers = [];
		}

		return { ...properties };
	},

	renderer: { type: snabbdom },
	view,
	styles,

	properties: {
		mode: { default: MODE_STANDARD },
		wafer: { default: 0 },
		selected: {
			default: "",
			observed: true,
		},
		editablevalues: { default: "", observed: true },
		editingIndex: { default: null, observed: true },
		editingValue: { default: "", observed: true },
		operation: { default: OPERATION_CREATE },
		readonly: { default: false },
		editablewafers: { default: [], observed: true },
	},

	connectedCallback(coeffects) {
		const { dispatch, updateProperties, state } = coeffects;

		if (
			state.properties.operation === OPERATION_CREATE &&
			!state.properties.wafer
		) {
			updateProperties({ wafer: 25, selected: {} });
		}

		setTimeout(() => {
			const payload = { ...state.properties };
			const selectedData = generateSelectedData(
				payload.mode,
				payload.selected,
				payload.editablevalues,
			);
			dispatch("SEND_COMP_DATA#VALUE_SET", {
				mode: payload.mode,
				wafer: payload.wafer,
				selected: selectedData,
				edited: payload.editablevalues,
				operation: payload.operation,
				readonly: payload.readonly,
				editablewafers: payload.editablewafers,
			});
		}, 0);
	},

	actionHandlers: {
		[COMPONENT_PROPERTY_CHANGED]({ properties, dispatch }) {
			const payload = { ...properties };
			const selectedData = generateSelectedData(
				payload.mode,
				payload.selected,
				payload.editablevalues,
			);
			dispatch("SEND_COMP_DATA#VALUE_SET", {
				mode: payload.mode,
				wafer: payload.wafer,
				selected: selectedData,
				edited: payload.editablevalues,
				operation: payload.operation,
				readonly: payload.readonly,
				editablewafers: payload.editablewafers,
			});
		},
	},
});
